scoring.title: Screening weights
scoring.meta: Set how much each screening dimension matters, per position. The AI screening score is weighted by these.
scoring.restricted: You need the settings.admin permission to manage scoring weights.
scoring.pickPositionFirst: Select a position to configure its screening weights.

shortlist.title: Shortlist
shortlist.meta: Top candidates awaiting your review, ranked by AI score + interview rating.
shortlist.emptyHint: Shortlisted candidates for your store appear here, ranked for your decision.
shortlist.notAvailableHint: The shortlist is limited to store line managers.

compare.title: Compare candidates
compare.meta: Eligible candidates for one position, ranked by screening + AI interview.
compare.pickPositionFirst: Select a position to compare its candidates.
compare.gridHint: Tick candidates in the ranking to compare them here (up to 6).
compare.emptyHint: Candidates who passed screening and completed the AI interview for this position appear here.
compare.notAvailableHint: Candidate comparison is for HR and hiring decision-makers.

interviews.title: Interviews
interviews.meta: Upcoming interviews in your scope, soonest first.
interviews.notAvailableHint: The interview calendar is limited to HR and interviewers.
interviews.emptyHint: Scheduled interviews appear here, grouped by day.

approvals.title: Approvals
approvals.meta: Hiring sign-offs awaiting your decision, oldest deadline first.
approvals.notAvailableHint: Approvals are limited to the hiring sign-off chain.
approvals.emptyHint: Hire requests that need your sign-off appear here.
approvals.submitHint: Submit this candidate into the four-level hiring approval chain.
approvals.rejectReasonPlaceholder: e.g. headcount frozen / not the right fit

offer.title: Offer
offer.createHint: Save the draft, then send it to the candidate.

onboarding.title: Onboarding documents
onboarding.reasonPlaceholder: Reason for rejection (shown to the candidate)

executive.title: Executive Overview
executive.meta: Company headcount, vacancies, pipeline & sourcing across all stores.
executive.notAvailableHint: The executive overview is limited to company-wide leadership roles.
executive.headcountNoBudgetLine: across all stores · budget pending HRIS
executive.noStaffingHint: Branch fill-rate appears here once headcount targets and hires are available.
executive.noPipelineHint: Applications by position appear here as candidates move through screening to hire.
executive.pendingHrisBody: Budget figures arrive once PeopleSoft / HRIS is connected. Actual headcount and vacancies below are live.
executive.roiPageMeta: Cost-vs-hires, volume, response, time-to-hire and success across every branch.
executive.roiDisclaimer: Based on configured cost assumptions, not finance data.
executive.roiUnsetTitle: Set cost assumptions to see ROI
executive.roiUnsetHint: ROI, cost-per-hire and savings are computed from admin-configured cost assumptions. Set them to unlock these figures.
executive.funnelEmptyHint: The intake funnel appears here once candidates apply within the selected period.
executive.tthEmptyHint: Median and average apply-to-signing days appear here once roles are filled in the selected period.
executive.successEmptyHint: Hires by the selected dimension appear here once applications and hires accumulate.
executive.costDesc: These figures drive the ROI dashboard. Leave a field blank to leave it unset.
executive.costSystemMonthlyHint: Total monthly cost of running the ATS.
executive.costTraditionalPerHireHint: Estimated cost per hire of the previous process (agencies, ads, manual effort).
executive.costVacancyPerDayHint: Estimated cost of leaving one role unfilled for a day.
executive.costTraditionalTthHint: Baseline apply-to-signing days before the ATS - used for vacancy-cost-avoided.

reports.title: ATS Reports
reports.meta: Recruitment funnel metrics for the selected period.
reports.notAvailable: Reports are not available for your role.
reports.notAvailableHint: Ask an administrator if you need access to recruitment reports.

search.title: Search candidates
search.meta: By name or province - across the entire pipeline.
search.promptHeading: Find anyone across the pipeline - by <name>name</name> or <province>province</province>.
search.promptBody: Search spans every store and every intake cycle. Jump in with a province below.
search.searchFailed: Search failed. Try a different term.
search.results: {count, plural, one {# result} other {# results}} for “{q}”
search.emptyBody: Check the spelling, or try a province name instead of a full name.

login.heroDesc: AI-assisted screening, ranked inboxes, and a single source of truth - from application to onboarding, across every store.
login.title: Sign in to the console
login.subtitle: Continue to the recruitment command center.
login.helpEntra: Sign in with your Microsoft organization account, or with an email and password provisioned by your administrator. Access and role permissions are managed centrally.
login.helpDev: Development sign-in for the screening team. Production access uses Microsoft Entra ID single sign-on or an administrator-provisioned password.

resume.aiInProgress: AI interview in progress - awaiting the candidate.
resume.noActions: No actions available at this stage.
resume.fitNotYet: Not analyzed yet - combines Screening and AI Interview results to recommend the most suitable position in the organization.
resume.fitNeedScore: Must pass Screening and AI Interview before fit can be analyzed
resume.intvFailed: Could not load the AI interview.
resume.schedDesc: Pick a date, time, and mode. Online interviews create a Microsoft Teams meeting and email the candidate a calendar invite.
resume.rejDesc: A reason is required. It is recorded for HR only and is never sent to the candidate.
resume.rejPlaceholder: e.g. qualifications don't match the role / did not pass the interview
resume.rvNoResumeBody: This application has no stored source document.
resume.rvNoPreviewBody: This {type} file can't be shown inline. Open it in a new tab to view or download.
resume.reassignStoreFailed: Could not move to the store
resume.reassignPoolFailed: Could not move to the central pool

admin.title: Admin
admin.restricted: These settings are restricted to super admins. Ask an administrator if you need access.
admin.meta: System-wide settings. Changes apply to everyone - handle with care.
admin.tenantAccessDesc: Controls which Microsoft organizations may sign in to the console.
admin.allowAllHelp: When off, only tenants on the configured allowlist can sign in. When on, any Microsoft work/school organization can sign in.
admin.allowAllAria: Allow all organizations to sign in
admin.advisoryOpen: Sign-in is open to any Microsoft organization. Tokens are still cryptographically verified, and users without an assigned role get the most restricted view - but anyone with a work/school account can reach the console. Prefer the allowlist unless you explicitly need open access.
admin.advisoryRestricted: Restricted to the configured tenant allowlist (recommended).
admin.tenantNote: Note: this controls backend acceptance only. For other organizations to actually reach the Microsoft login, the dashboard must be built with the multi-tenant authority and the Entra app registration must be multi-tenant.
admin.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.
admin.usersDesc: Local username & password accounts that sign in alongside Microsoft.
admin.usersEmpty: No local accounts yet. Add one to enable password sign-in.
admin.createDesc: Provision a local account that signs in with email and password.
admin.tempPasswordPlaceholder: At least 10 characters, a letter and a number
admin.editDesc: Change role or status, or reset the password. Resetting a password or disabling the account signs the user out everywhere immediately.
admin.resetPasswordPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep current password
admin.rbacDesc: Define what each role can do and the data it can see. Changes take effect immediately.
admin.permissionCount: {count, plural, =0 {No permissions} one {# permission} other {# permissions}}
admin.scopeHint: Limits which candidates and stores this role can see.
admin.createRoleDesc: Add a custom role and choose its permissions and data scope.
admin.editRoleDesc: Adjust this role's permissions and data scope.
admin.roleKeyHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores. Cannot be changed later.
admin.dpoDesignateHelp: Publish this account as a DPO on the privacy notice (PDPA s.41).
admin.dpoPrimaryHelp: Feature this officer on the privacy notice. Promoting demotes any other primary.
admin.areaCoverageNone: No areas defined yet (create them in the Areas console)

members.title: Career Portal members
members.restricted: This page is limited to super admin and HR manager
members.notFound: Member not found, or has been deleted
members.noApplications: This member hasn't applied for any job yet
members.hasApplications: {count} applications - view them in the Inbox (search by name/email)
members.anonymizedNotice: This account has been erased under PDPA - no further actions apply
members.confirmSuspendDesc: The member is logged out immediately and cannot sign in until reactivated
members.confirmEraseDesc: PDPA erasure permanently removes name, email, phone, login providers, and resume - this cannot be undone
members.editDesc: Leave blank to keep the current value
members.notesPlaceholder: Record an observation about this member…

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.meta: Pipeline conversion, sourcing efficiency, and scheduled deliveries.
analytics.kpiTotalHeroSub: Across all stores · current intake cycle
analytics.sourcesEmptyHint: Channel performance appears here once applications carry a source. Walk-in, website, and campaign volumes will rank below.
analytics.backlogEmptyHint: When candidates are scored and waiting for an operator, the busiest stores rank here.
analytics.rolesEmptyHint: Open vacancies imported from PeopleSoft appear here, ranked by headcount.
analytics.exportsDesc: Funnel · KPI · sources - delivered on a recurring schedule
analytics.exportsEmpty: No exports yet. Run one with “Export now”.

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.desc: A live read of recruitment across all stores - intake, screening, and onboarding.
dashboard.passRateBody: of applicants pass screening. {onboarded} onboarded this cycle.

candidates.title: Candidates
candidates.meta: {count, plural, one {# candidate} other {# candidates}} on file · all stores
candidates.emptyBody: Records appear here automatically as applications are received and parsed.
candidates.emptyBodyLong: Records appear here automatically as applications are received and parsed by the screening engine.

inbox.title: Applications
inbox.meta: {count, plural, one {# candidate} other {# candidates}} · best fit first
inbox.loadError: Failed to load candidates. Try again in a moment.
inbox.emptyFilteredBody: Try widening the status or lowering the minimum fit to see more candidates.
inbox.emptyClearBody: Newly screened candidates land here, ranked by AI fit. You're all caught up.
inbox.detailNotFound: Application not found, or it has been removed.

bulk.title: Bulk CV upload
bulk.help: Pick a position, then choose up to {max} CV files (PDF, DOCX, JPG, PNG, ≤25MB each). Screening runs automatically.
bulk.selectedFiles: {n, plural, one {# file selected} other {# files selected}}
bulk.noPermission: You do not have permission to bulk-upload CVs.

requisitions.title: Requisitions
requisitions.meta: Open and approve position openings across your stores.
requisitions.restricted: You need the manage requisitions permission to view this page.
requisitions.createDesc: Open a new position requisition. It needs approval before it goes live.
requisitions.jdInternalHint: These details are saved to the requisition for approval. The public job posting shows the position's standard JD.
requisitions.lockIdentityHint: Position and store are locked once approved. To change them, close this requisition and open a new one.
requisitions.psLockHint: This opening is synced from PeopleSoft. Position, store, and headcount are managed there; you can edit the details below.

pdpa.title: PDPA / DPO console
pdpa.meta: Action data-subject requests, look up consent, and see the PDPA compliance overview
pdpa.restricted: You need the PDPA / DPO console permission to view this page
pdpa.overdueWarning: {count} breach(es) past the 72h PDPC deadline and not yet notified
pdpa.retentionBody: Candidate data is auto-erased after {days} days
pdpa.rejectDescription: Give a reason for rejecting; it is recorded in the audit trail
pdpa.consentHint: Enter a data subject's account id to see their consent given/withdrawn history
pdpa.dpoUnset: No DPO has been designated yet. Set one in Admin → user accounts.

privacy.title: Privacy notice
privacy.meta: The published privacy notice (the same document candidates see) and the DPO contact, for internal reference
privacy.noticeUnavailable: The privacy notice could not be loaded right now
privacy.dpoUnset: DPO contact is not configured yet. Set PDPA_DPO_* on the server.
privacy.consoleLink: Action data-subject requests and look up consent in the PDPA / DPO console

access.title: You do not have access yet
access.body: Your account is signed in, but no permissions have been assigned to it. Access to this console is granted by an administrator.
access.contact: Please contact your CPO, CHRO, or system administrator to request access.

areas.title: Area management
areas.subtitle: Group stores into areas and assign the area HR who cover them.
areas.denied: You do not have permission to manage areas.
areas.confirmDelete: Delete this area? Store and member assignments will be removed.
areas.empty: No areas yet. Create one above.
areas.selectPrompt: Select an area to manage its stores and members.

lock.unlocked: No one is processing this candidate
lock.claimed: You are now processing this candidate
